nasb.text: But the woman had taken the two men and hidden them, and she said, “Yes, the men came to me, but I did not know where they were from.

esv.text: But the woman had taken the two men and hidden them. And she said, “True, the men came to me, but I did not know where they were from.

cnv.text: 但那女人已把那兩個人藏起來，還這樣回答王：“不錯，那些人到過我這裡來，但是，我不知道他們是從哪裡來的。

ccb.text: 但喇合已经把二人藏起来了，她答道：“不错，他们来过，可是我不知他们是从哪里来的。
